page_content:
NEUR238 Special Topics in Neuroscience Student Initiated Courses (1 Credit)

Student Initiated Course (STIC) in Neuroscience. Course will be student initiated and taught in a "journal club” style under close supervision of a faculty mentor. Student instructor and faculty mentor must generate proposal and have approval of the Neuroscience Program to offer a NEUR238 STIC. NEUR238 cannot be applied to the degree requirements of any neuroscience major.

Repeatable to: 5 credits if content differs.
